zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield於1277年出生在英國奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯時，他的父親Robert de Grey31歲，母親Joan de Valoines29歲。他於1292年與Margaret Oddingseles在英國奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1311年10月17日在英國維爾爾維爾頓享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾可格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield于1277年出生在英国奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯时，他的父亲Robert de Grey31岁，母亲Joan de Valoines29岁。他于1292年与Margaret Oddingseles在英国奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1311年10月17日在英国維爾爾維爾頓享年34岁，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾可格斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield was born in 1277, in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Robert de Grey, was 31 and his mother, Joan de Valoines, was 29. He married Margaret Oddingseles in 1292, in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 17 October 1311, in Wilton, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 34, and was buried in Cogges, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield est né en 1277, à Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Grey, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan de Valoines, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Oddingseles en 1292, à Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 octobre 1311, à Wilton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Cogges, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield 1277 in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Grey 31 und seine Mutter Joan de Valoines 29. Er hat 1292 in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England Margaret Oddingseles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 17. Oktober 1311 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Wilton, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Cogges, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield è nato il nel 1277 nel Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Grey, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Valoines, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Oddingseles nel 1292, nel Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 17 ottobre 1311, nel Wilton, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Cogges, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfieldが1277年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアロスエルフィールド グレイズで生まれた時，父Robert de Greyは31歳，母Joan de Valoinesは29歳であった。1292年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアロスエルフィールド グレイズでMargaret Oddingselesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1311年10月17日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアウィルトンで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアコグジェズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield(이)가 1277년 영국 스퍼드실르 로더필드 그리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Grey(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Valoines(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1292년 영국 스퍼드실르 로더필드 그리스에서 Margaret Oddingseles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1311년 10월 17일 영국 윌츠히르 윌턴에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 코그스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield nasceu em 1277, em Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Grey, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Valoines, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Oddingseles em 1292, em Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 17 de outubro de 1311, em Wilton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Cogges, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield родился в 1277 г. в местности ротирфиелд грис, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Grey было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan de Valoines, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Oddingseles в 1292 г. в местности ротирфиелд грис, оксфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 17 октября 1311 г. в местности уилтон, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности когесь, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield nació en 1277, en Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Grey, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan de Valoines, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret Oddingseles en 1292, en Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 17 de octubre de 1311, en Wilton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Cogges, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
